incidentSummary: Incoming request omitted correlation header; gateway generated one and propagation was validated end-to-end.

rootCauseHypotheses.cause: No platform fault confirmed; correlation fallback behavior operated as designed
rootCauseHypotheses.reasoningSummary: Gateway log shows generated correlation ID and downstream services log the same value, so missing inbound header did not become an incident.

performanceFindings: No measurable latency or error-rate impact from ID generation path.
missingData: If strict client contract requires caller-supplied IDs, policy evidence is needed to classify this as non-compliant.
recommendedActions: Keep auto-generation enabled and document behavior for external clients.
Optionally emit an audit event when upstream requests omit X-Correlation-Id.
